SEARCH
程序包 appreview.data

类 DataRepository

java.lang.Object
appreview.data.DataRepository
public class DataRepository extends Object
Repository for file-based data loading and writing.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    DataRepository(String dataDirPath)
    Build repository with data folder path.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    List<ApplicationRecord>
    loadApplications()
    Load all TA applications.
    List<JobRecord>
    loadJobs()
    Load all jobs.
    List<ReviewRecord>
    loadReviewRecords()
    Load review records from data/logs/review_records.json.
    List<TaProfile>
    loadTaProfiles()
    Load TA users.
    void
    updateApplicationReview(ApplicationRecord application, String decision, String notes)
    Update review decision to application file and review history file.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 构造器详细资料

    • DataRepository

      public DataRepository(String dataDirPath)
      Build repository with data folder path.
      参数:
      dataDirPath - data directory path

  • 方法详细资料

    • loadApplications

      public List<ApplicationRecord> loadApplications() throws IOException
      Load all TA applications.
      返回:
      list
      抛出:
      IOException - io failure

    • loadJobs

      public List<JobRecord> loadJobs() throws IOException
      Load all jobs.
      返回:
      jobs
      抛出:
      IOException - io failure

    • loadTaProfiles

      public List<TaProfile> loadTaProfiles() throws IOException
      Load TA users.
      返回:
      ta profile list
      抛出:
      IOException - io failure

    • updateApplicationReview

      public void updateApplicationReview(ApplicationRecord application, String decision, String notes) throws IOException
      Update review decision to application file and review history file.
      参数:
      application - application object
      decision - approved/rejected
      notes - review notes
      抛出:
      IOException - io failure

    • loadReviewRecords

      public List<ReviewRecord> loadReviewRecords() throws IOException
      Load review records from data/logs/review_records.json.
      返回:
      records
      抛出:
      IOException - io failure
